query:
INSERT INTO testimonials (name, initial, date, title, text, featured, displayOrder, category) VALUES
('Yumi', 'Y', 'March 6, 2023', 'A Road to Self Empowerment', 'I find myself saying \'my life coach has changed my life\' to everyone I know. With Jeff\'s life coaching I finally understand what self respect feels like. Jeff taught me to be self sufficient. Before I would blame everyone around me instead of forgiving one\'s that have hurt me. If you are ready find ways to free yourself from burdens that haunt you, or even if you want and need someone to really hear you, cry with you, make you look at your mirror and empower you, Jeff is the perfect person.', 0, 5, NULL),
('Denitra', 'D', 'November 8, 2022', 'Awaken!!!', 'Jeff is amazing!! I struggle with anxiety and depression.. when I started with Jeff it was hard to comprehend what was real vs what my ego is telling me, but in one session right before my eyes the negative assumptions changed and I saw the positive outcome. Jeff is the real deal!!! He knows how to get you to see the real story. I absolutely love him.. and so grateful that he was manifested in my life. I even use the tools he has given me to help my kids!!! Now that\'s priceless.', 0, 6, NULL),
('Peter', 'P', 'September 16, 2022', 'Transformational', 'I feel like I\'ve know Jeff for a life time even though I\'ve only known him for a couple of years and only met in-person once. It is incredible the way Jeff is able to \'get alongside me\' as life throws up different challenges. My conversations with Jeff have radically changed my life for the better in ways that I can\'t possibly hope to articulate in a few sentences. In some ways I feel like I\'ve only just started such is the excitement around the way that I\'ve changed and the corresponding changes happening around me.', 0, 7, NULL),
('Mike Barnett', 'M', 'August 21, 2022', 'At the root of it all', 'Sometimes just the idea of therapy feels like it might help but it that\'s not about resolution and freedom.. that\'s about keeping the old story going and feeding it… Jeff is about freedom… freedom of our pasts that don\'t serve us and keep us living from a stale point in time. When I think back to what he was telling me would be possible for me… I loved the idea and felt hope but a large part of me felt it might be a fantasy. It was not a fantasy… I\'m living proof of what he told me was possible.', 0, 8, NULL);
